name: research
description: Bounded research plugin with codexlab-hosted scout, analyst, and late skeptic workers for evidence-backed investigation.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded research with codexlab-hosted workers and traceable evidence.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local standard research plugin for Codex. Starts with one main research agent and a brief, dynamically dispatches codexlab-hosted scout and analyst workers only for clearly independent research slices, prefers a late skeptic pass before recommendation, verifies key claims before finalizing, and runs an adversarial review before producing either a decision-ready result or an explicit not-decision-ready outcome.
defaultPrompt: Research this topic and give me a decision-ready recommendation.
Compare these options with tradeoffs and confidence.
Investigate this tool or repo and summarize best practices.
